subcodes.first_line: The first fragrance wafted from the garment of the favor of the Lord of Lords upon thee, O 'Abdu'l-Wahháb. I testify that thou hast rent asunder [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اول نفحه فاحت من قمیص عنایه رب الارباب علیک یا عبدالوهاب اشهد انک خرقت
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @visitation Tablets, @eulogies; reminiscences, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
